title: Undersea Kingdom
writer: John Rathmell, Maurice Geraghty, Oliver Drake
actors: Ray Corrigan, Lois Wilde, Monte Blue
plot: Crash Corrigan, a recent graduate of Annapolis, and Diana, a go-getting reporter, join Professor Norton for a search for the source of a string of earthquakes, Atlantis. They ride Prof. Norton's rocket submarine searching the sea ...
